extract: X-Scissor (Japanese: シザークロス Scissor Cross) is a damage-dealing Bug-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM81 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM24 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR60 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM105 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM081 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
